services.marriageHelpBlurb: Our marriage registration specialists are ready to answer your questions.

marriageRegistration.packagesIntro: Choose the level of support that fits your needs. All packages include expert guidance and support throughout your journey.
marriageRegistration.faqIntro: Common questions about MFA legalization, document requirements, and the marriage registration process in Thailand.

faqItems.q: What is MFA legalization, and why do I need it for marriage registration?
faqItems.a: MFA legalization is the process of verifying and authenticating documents at the Thai Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA) so they are recognized for official use in Thailand and abroad. For marriage registration, your Embassy-issued Affirmation of Freedom to Marry must be legalized by the MFA before it can be accepted at the District Office. This ensures your documents meet Thai legal requirements.

faqItems.q: How long does MFA legalization and the full marriage process take?
faqItems.a: MFA legalization typically takes 2–5 business days. The full process from document preparation to Amphur registration usually takes 2–4 weeks, depending on Embassy processing times and MFA availability. SiamEZ keeps you updated at every stage. Expedited options may reduce this to 1–2 weeks with our Premium package.

faqItems.q: What types of documents require MFA legalization for marriage?
faqItems.a: For marriage registration, the main document requiring MFA legalization is your Embassy-issued Affirmation of Freedom to Marry. If you have divorce decrees or death certificates (when widowed), these must also be translated and legalized. The MFA authenticates personal documents for official use. Contact SiamEZ if you are unsure whether your documents need legalization.

faqItems.q: How will I receive my legalized documents?
faqItems.a: We coordinate collection and handover with you—typically in person when you attend appointments, or by secure arrangement you agree with your case manager. You will know exactly when each document is ready and what to bring next.

faqItems.q: Do I need to translate my documents before submission to the MFA?
faqItems.a: Yes. All non-Thai documents must be translated into Thai for MFA submission. Thai documents intended for use abroad must be translated into the required foreign language. SiamEZ provides certified translation coordination as part of our marriage registration process, ensuring your documents meet official language requirements and formatting standards.

faqItems.q: Can I handle the marriage registration process myself, or should I use a service?
faqItems.a: You can submit documents to the MFA and attend the Amphur yourself, but the process is complicated and time-consuming—requiring proper formatting, certified translations, Embassy coordination, and legal knowledge. Professional assistance helps avoid costly delays and rejections while keeping you legally compliant.

faqItems.q: Do both partners need to be present at the Amphur?
faqItems.a: Yes. Thai law requires both parties to appear in person at the District Office (Amphur) for marriage registration. Two witnesses (typically Thai nationals) must also be present with valid identification. SiamEZ can help arrange witnesses and accompany you on the day for a smooth experience.

marriageRegistration.independentNotice: SiamEZ offers professional assistance and consultancy services as an independent company. We are not connected to or endorsed by the Thai government.

driverLicensePage.metaDescription: Get your Thai driving license under 2026 DLT rules: conversion, renewal, new car/bike, and IDP. Fast-track options, exam prep, and bilingual coordinators in Bangkok.
driverLicensePage.subtitle: Fast-track appointments, group packages, and exam preparation — all handled by our bilingual team. We turn DLT requirements into a clear checklist and walk you through every step.
driverLicensePage.overview: Whether you are converting a foreign license, renewing, applying new for car or motorcycle, or need an International Driving Permit (IDP), SiamEZ coordinates schools, documents, and DLT appointments. We stay current with 2026 rules on health certificates, proof of address, and theory exam content so you avoid surprises at the office.

features.title: DLT-aligned process
features.description: We follow Department of Land Transport (DLT) requirements and office-specific cut-off times.

features.title: English + Thai support
features.description: Coordinators in Bangkok with WhatsApp updates so you always know the next step.

features.title: FastTrack & groups
features.description: Optional expedited booking plus coordinated slots for families and corporate groups.

features.title: 2026 health & vision checks
features.description: Guidance on medical certificates and color-blind / reaction tests used at Thai DLT offices.

features.title: Transparent packages
features.description: Clear base prices and add-ons — no hidden “extra forms” after you book.

features.title: Recognized school partners
features.description: We work with DLT-recognized driving schools used to foreign applicants.

requirements: Passport with a valid visa or extension.
Proof of Thai address (e.g. yellow house book, work permit, or embassy letter, depending on your case).
Medical certificate issued within 30 days of your appointment.
Existing license for conversion — must be in English; otherwise a translation letter is required.
Appointment scheduling: minimum three business days’ lead time; weekends are generally not available at DLT.

processSteps.title: Book & plan
processSteps.description: Choose service type (conversion, renewal, new, or IDP), optional add-ons, and your preferred weekday. Your coordinator confirms timing against DLT availability.

processSteps.title: Document pre-check
processSteps.description: Share visa, address proof, health certificate, and license scans so we catch issues before you travel to the office.

processSteps.title: Theory, video & tests
processSteps.description: Prepare with our English question bank aligned to the 2026 layout. Complete the mandatory safety video and any theory, vision, color, and practical steps your case requires.

processSteps.title: DLT visit & license
processSteps.description: We escort you through the appointment. You receive a temporary license where applicable, then the permanent card on the DLT timeline.

documentsForeigner: Passport with valid visa or extension
Proof of Thai address (yellow book, work permit, or embassy letter as applicable)
Medical certificate from a licensed provider (within 30 days)
Original foreign driver’s license for conversion (English or certified translation)
Passport-style photos as required by the DLT office

driverLicensePage.trustLead: We focus on Bangkok offices and keep communication in one thread — from first question to licensed.
trustPoints: Coordinators on the ground in Bangkok
Updated for 2026 color-blind, reaction, and health checks

driverLicensePage.packagesIntro: Final totals depend on your license type and add-ons. Your coordinator confirms everything in writing before payment.

packageRows.name: Apply new
packageRows.price: Bike 3,500 THB · Car 5,000 THB · Both 7,500 THB

driverLicensePage.addonsIntro: Prices update your package total in real time when selected.
driverLicensePage.schedulingBody: Allow at least three business days before your preferred date. Weekends are usually unavailable. If you process car and motorcycle together, expect a longer appointment block.
driverLicensePage.paymentBody: Once your coordinator confirms the package total, you can pay by bank transfer to Kasikorn Bank (KBank) or PromptPay. Upload your transfer slip through our booking flow or send it on WhatsApp — we match it to your file before the DLT visit.
driverLicensePage.promptPayNote: PromptPay QR and exact amount are shared with your booking confirmation.

resources.title: Track & trace
resources.body: After booking, your coordinator sends a reference ID. Use it to see status and the next expected step.

resources.title: Practice exam (2026 layout)
resources.body: Timed mock exams in English, sign and hazard questions, and explanations matched to current DLT theory style.

resources.title: 1-hour mandatory video
resources.body: DLT requires a safety video session. We schedule it at an approved school or share the latest official link for your city.

resources.title: 2026 rules snapshot
resources.body: Stronger checks on health certificates, proof of address, and theory content for foreign applicants — we adjust your checklist as DLT guidance changes.

eventPlanningVenuePage.metaDescription: Bespoke event planning and exclusive venue hire in Bangkok. SiamEZ × The Red Door Bkk — corporate events, private celebrations, and VIP table bookings in a premier speakeasy setting.
eventPlanningVenuePage.heroTitle: Bespoke Event Planning & Exclusive Venue Hire
eventPlanningVenuePage.subtitle: Elevate your celebrations at Bangkok's premier speakeasy. SiamEZ and The Red Door Bkk bring you curated experiences in an atmosphere unlike any other.
eventPlanningVenuePage.overview: From corporate gatherings to private celebrations and exclusive VIP experiences, we combine professional coordination with an intimate venue in the heart of Bangkok. Tell us your vision — we handle the details so you can enjoy the moment.
eventPlanningVenuePage.processingTime: We typically reply within 2–5 business days (complex events may take longer)

features.title: Corporate events
features.description: Product launches, team offsites, and client entertaining in a distinguished setting with full event support.

features.title: Private celebrations
features.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, and intimate gatherings. We handle every detail so you can enjoy the moment.

features.title: VIP table bookings

requirements: Event type (corporate, celebration, VIP evening, or other)
Preferred date(s) or timeframe and approximate guest count
Budget range and any must-haves (catering, AV, branding, entertainment)
Contact name, email, and WhatsApp or phone for follow-up
Any accessibility, dietary, or run-of-show notes we should know early

processSteps.title: Share your event details
processSteps.description: Reach out with your occasion, dates, headcount, and priorities — we confirm feasibility and next steps.

processSteps.title: Curated proposal
processSteps.description: Receive a tailored plan and indicative pricing from SiamEZ, with venue and production elements coordinated through The Red Door Bkk where applicable.

processSteps.title: Refine & confirm
processSteps.description: We adjust the brief, vendors, and timeline until you are happy to lock the date and scope.

processSteps.title: Your event
processSteps.description: Professional on-site coordination from setup through wrap-up so you and your guests can focus on the experience.

documentsForeigner: Brief description of the event and desired atmosphere
Preferred date(s) and backup options if flexible
Estimated headcount and format (seated dinner, standing reception, presentation, etc.)
Company or brand name (for corporate events)
Catering, bar, AV, entertainment, or décor requirements
Billing contact and any internal approval process we should respect
eventPlanningVenuePage.collaborationBody: SiamEZ brings decades of professional management and event coordination expertise. The Red Door Bkk offers an intimate speakeasy space in the heart of Bangkok. Together, we create unforgettable moments — from corporate gatherings to private celebrations and exclusive VIP experiences.
eventPlanningVenuePage.collaborationTagline: SiamEZ — management & planning × The Red Door Bkk — the space
eventPlanningVenuePage.venueBody:
Step behind The Red Door into a world of refined speakeasy charm. Low lighting, rich textures, and an air of exclusivity set the stage for memorable events. Whether you're hosting a dozen guests or a hundred, the space adapts to your vision.

Located in Bangkok, The Red Door Bkk combines classic cocktail culture with modern event capabilities — an ideal canvas for SiamEZ's professional planning and coordination.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Real experiences from satisfied customers who trusted SiamEZ with their needs
testimonials.metaDescription: Read what our clients have to say about their experience with SiamEZ

testimonial1.quote: SiamEZ made our marriage registration process incredibly smooth. They handled all the paperwork and guided us through every step. We couldn't have done it without their help!
testimonial1.author: Sarah & Michael

testimonial2.quote: Fast, accurate, and professional translation services. I needed urgent document translation for my visa application, and they delivered within 24 hours. Highly recommended!
testimonial2.author: James Davis

testimonial3.quote: Converting my international license to a Thai license was much easier than I expected thanks to SiamEZ. The team was knowledgeable and helped me navigate all the requirements.
testimonial3.author: Emma Wilson

testimonial4.quote: Outstanding service! They helped me extend my visa without any hassle. The staff was professional, responsive, and made sure everything was done correctly. Worth every baht!
testimonial4.author: Robert Kim

testimonial5.quote: I was dreading the vehicle registration process, but SiamEZ made it stress-free. They handled everything from start to finish, and I got my registration done quickly. Excellent service!
testimonial5.author: Lisa Thompson

testimonial6.quote: Used their private driver service for a month and was very impressed. Professional, punctual, and safe drivers. Made my daily commute so much easier. Will definitely use again!
testimonial6.author: Chris Martinez

testimonial7.quote: Needed a police clearance certificate for my work permit. SiamEZ handled the entire process efficiently and kept me updated throughout. Got my certificate faster than expected!
testimonial7.author: Alex Nguyen

testimonial8.quote: Had some home repairs needed and SiamEZ connected me with skilled professionals. The work was done on time and to a high standard. Very satisfied with the quality!
testimonial8.author: Patricia Brown

testimonial9.quote: Used their airport transfer service multiple times. Always on time, clean vehicles, and friendly drivers. They make traveling in Thailand so much easier. Highly recommend!
testimonial9.author: David Lee
